untranslatable_reason: Dragonfly doji pattern detection requires specific candlestick geometry analysis (open == close or near-equal, long lower shadow, minimal upper wick) that cannot be precisely expressed with available indicators. Market regime classification (BULL vs BEAR) is not in allowed regimes list. Volume confirmation logic and breakout intensity measurement lack precise indicator definitions.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using lower_wick and close price relationships, but true dragonfly doji pattern matching requires explicit pattern recognition. Success rates (77-80%) and median lower shadow percentages (1.94-2.63%) documented per regime but cannot be operationalized without pattern detection. Suggest implementing dedicated candlestick pattern recognizer for this signal.
